headline: Orion Group to Report Q1 Results: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: ORN is set to report Q1 results on April 28. EPS is seen at breakeven and revenues are seen up 5% to $195.2M on Marine/Concrete strength and J.E. McAmis boost.

headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Comfort Systems, MasTec, Quanta Services, EMCOR and Dycom
summary: FIX, MTZ, PWR, EME and DY stand out as infrastructure and data center demand offset housing weakness ahead of Q1 2026 earnings season.

headline: Hill York Becomes Official HVAC Provider of Nu Stadium, Delivering State-of-the-Art Mechanical Systems
summary: MIAMI, April 23, 2026--Hill York Service Company, LLC (Hill York) is pleased to announce a collaboration with Inter Miami CF as the official HVAC provider at the Club’s Miami home, Nu Stadium. Hill York delivered a full state-of-the-art mechanical systems package to support the 26,700-seat soccer stadium, which opened on April 4.
